# AI Supply Chain Trust

Open-source repository trust and safety evaluator by AIBIM. It converts public repository evidence into agent-ready context, vulnerability leads, JSON and Markdown artifacts, and MCP output.

Core routes: /, /contexts, /r/<owner>/<repo>
API: /api/v1/openapi.json
Source: https://github.com/aibim-ai/AI-Supply-Chain-Trust
